values.description: Base URL of the AARM Azure Function App (no trailing slash).
Azure Function default host key. Find it in Azure Portal → Function App → App keys.
Azure AD tenant ID (GUID) of a target tenant that has been scanned.
Environment name as configured in jobs.json (e.g. PROD, DEV).
Azure AD tenant ID used for Azure AD authentication (usually the function's host tenant). Used by the Get Token request.
App Registration client ID used to obtain an AAD token (if using AAD auth instead of Function Key).
Client secret for the aadClientId App Registration.
AAD access token. Set automatically by the post-response script on the Get Token request.
